---
# title: Junior researchers - WIKI
toc: true
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/polemecanique/internal_seminars
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## {{< iconify fa6-solid:book-atlas >}} &nbsp; Welcome to the Pôle Méca internal seminar series webpage!

This website serves as a central hub for the Pôle Méca internal seminar series.
This series consists of **regular seminars** co-organized by all labs from the **Pôle Mécanique**.
Anyone (PhD students, postdocs, and permanent faculty members) are welcome to present their work!

In addition to this page, you can find:

* [**Past Seminars Archive**](PastSeminarsArchive.qmd): Access previous seminar presentations and slide decks.
* [**Miscellaneous**](AdditionalResources.qmd): Additional information and tools to support your daily scientific activities.


### {{< iconify fa6-solid:calendar-days >}} &nbsp; Schedule

<iframe id="open-web-calendar" 
    style="background:url('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/niccokunzmann/open-web-calendar/master/static/img/loaders/circular-loader.gif') center center no-repeat;"
    src="https://icsviewer.ecam.fr/calendar.html?css=.CALENDAR-INDEX-0%20%7B%20background-color%3A%20%231c71d8%3B%20%7D&amp;tab=agenda&amp;tabs=agenda&amp;title=Internal%20Seminar%20P%C3%B4le%20M%C3%A9canique&amp;url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fpolemecanique%2Finternal_seminars%2Frefs%2Fheads%2Fmain%2FResources%2Finternal_seminars_pole_mecanique.ics"
    sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-top-navigation"
    allowTransparency="true" scrolling="no" 
    frameborder="0" height="250px" width="100%"></iframe>

To stay updated, you can subscribe to the calendar using the following **ICS link** in your preferred calendar application: <br> 🔗 **[Subscribe via ICS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/polemecanique/internal_seminars/refs/heads/main/Resources/internal_seminars_pole_mecanique.ics)**.

### {{< iconify fa6-solid:people-group >}} &nbsp; Organizers

  **Name**               | **Affiliation** | **Email**                                      |
|------------------------|-----------------|------------------------------------------------|
| Arianna Giannetti      | LadHyX          | [arianna.giannetti@polytechnique.edu](mailto:arianna.giannetti@polytechnique.edu) |
| Thomas Lavigne         | LMS             | [thomas.lavigne@polytechnique.edu](mailto:thomas.lavigne@polytechnique.edu)         |
| André Stabile          | IMSIA           | [andre.de-figueiredo-stabile@ensta.fr](mailto:andre.de-figueiredo-stabile@ensta.fr) |
| Flavien Loiseau        | IMSIA           | [flavien.loiseau@ensta.fr](mailto:flavien.loiseau@ensta.fr)       

### {{< iconify fa6-solid:person-chalkboard >}} &nbsp; Propose a talk

To propose a talk, please contact one of the organizers with the following information:

- **Name**
- **Lab/Affiliation**
- **Presentation title**
- **Format**: very short (around 10 minutes), short (around 20 minutes), long (around 40-45 minutes).
- **Additional remarks** (e.g., schedule constraints, preferred date, or other format requests)

The list of proposed speakers is available here: [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1U3RrbkfuEJfEymMEQy5uzr9ZSJeeTyjdcvFXVCh01B8/edit?gid=2037295576#gid=2037295576](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1U3RrbkfuEJfEymMEQy5uzr9ZSJeeTyjdcvFXVCh01B8/edit?gid=2037295576#gid=2037295576).


![](Resources/Images/PoleMeca.jpg)
